set.body:
Upstream implementation for Scalafim epic bd-01KXYJK0XSA3RNH9ANMVC96EPE and prerequisite bd-01KXYJKK5CNK028N4EHSFPSD79.

Add the Gale-owned generic API surface required to retire Scalafim internal linalg: pivoted configurable QR; matrix-RHS QR and Cholesky solves; allocation-conscious Q and QT application, residualization, and normalized covariance; efficient shared DMat owned construction or builder workspace; and generic operator adjoint, composition, restrictions, block construction, and batch matrix application.

Acceptance: public cross-platform contracts preserve storage encapsulation; core JVM and JS suites and Gale laws pass; differential or independent numerical tests cover factorization semantics; allocation and performance evidence covers representative Scalafim shapes; no fMRI domain policy enters Gale.
set.title: Scalafim adoption: add migration-complete linalg APIs
